response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM tooling, Spring, or enterprise IDE development — key requirements for the role. Their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only brief, non-substantive mentions of Java in past roles. No evidence of IDE internals, build tool integration, or application server tooling is present.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Active open-source contributor with tooling projects (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Proven ability to lead and teach via workshops and technical talks
concerns: No recent or substantial Java/Kotlin or JVM tooling experience
Missing direct exposure to Spring, Hibernate, or enterprise IDE development
Career gap and recent roles focus on non-JVM ecosystems (TypeScript, DLang)
